queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of requested credit amount on default probability and its role as a primary credit risk driver.
Determinants of default: The statistical relationship between extended loan duration in months and elevated credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: The correlation between the absence of a checking account and increased probability of loan default.
